purpose: Post-review fail-closed hardening; ordinary append-only evidence commit

findings.reason: Several catalog command entries described an already executed gate but were not directly executable command lines. Every entry is now an exact command; non-build commands were executed and pwsh entrypoints were resolved.
CLOSURE-10 now directly binds the immutable AI coverage report and records exact baseline/actual line and branch rates.

selfReferencePolicy: The final append commit SHA/tree and final manifest SHA are recorded only after push in the root strict review and final delivery, not inside this commit.
